cleaning_products.description: 'bring' = Fada provides sprays and cloths (not mops, buckets, or vacuums). 'provide' = customer provides all products.

weekend_surcharge.description: Additional charge of £10 applied when booking falls on Friday, Saturday, or Sunday

preferred_date.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be a future date.

preferred_time.description: Arrival time slot. 30-min intervals between 09:00 and 17:00 e.g. "10:00"

source.description: Which page or flow the message came from

hours_per_week.description: Desired hours of cleaning work per week

right_to_work_uk.description: Must be true — applicant confirms right to work in UK

has_uk_bank_account.description: Must be true — applicant confirms they have a UK bank account

understands_self_employed.description: Must be true — applicant confirms they understand self-employment

no_criminal_record.description: Must be true — applicant confirms no criminal record

accepts_terms.description: Must be true — applicant has read and accepted the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service

date.description: ISO date, must be in the future

password.description: Minimum 8 characters, must include at least one number

phone.description: E.164 phone number — must have a verified OTP

Record_string.unknown_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Record_string.number_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

info.title: fada-lustre-api
info.description: Backend API for Fada Lustre — a professional cleaning marketplace based in Derby, UK.

post.description:
Create a new support ticket with a title and initial message.
Available to both customers and cleaners.

get.description: List the user's support tickets with optional status filter and pagination.

Retrieve a support ticket with its full message thread.
Only accessible by the ticket owner.

Retrieve the current pricing configuration including hourly rates,
add-on prices, frequency discounts, and service fees.

post.description:
Calculate an instant cleaning quote based on postcode, rooms, hours,
cleaning products preference, and frequency. Returns itemised line items and total.

patch.description:
Schedule a previously created quote by setting a preferred date and time slot.
Converts the quote into a bookable appointment.

get.description:
Retrieve the authenticated customer's profile including name, email,
phone, and profile image.

patch.description:
Update the customer's profile fields (name, email, etc.).
Only provided fields are updated.

Initiate a phone number change by sending an OTP via SMS or email.
The phone number is updated after OTP verification.

get.description:
List all saved payment methods for the authenticated customer.
Returns card details with masked numbers.

post.description:
Add a new payment method (card) to the customer's account.
Card details are tokenised — only the last 4 digits are stored.

delete.description: Remove a saved payment method. Only the owner can delete their methods.

get.description:
List notifications for the authenticated user with pagination.
Returns both read and unread notifications.

patch.description: Mark a specific notification as read. Returns 204 on success.

post.description: Submit a contact form message from the website. No authentication required.

Submit a custom service request from the website.
Used when customers need a service outside standard offerings.

Submit a new cleaner application. Captures personal details,
experience, availability, and compliance declarations.

get.description:
Retrieve full details of a cleaner application by ID.
Accessible by the applicant and admins.

patch.description:
Update a draft cleaner application before final submission.
Only applications in 'draft' status can be modified.

get.description:
Retrieve all active cleaning services. Supports optional text search.
Public endpoint — no authentication required.
Retrieve a single service by its URL-friendly slug.
Retrieve all blog categories.

Retrieve published blog posts with optional filtering by category, search,
and pagination.
Retrieve a single blog post by its slug, including full content.
Retrieve all frequently asked questions. Supports optional text search.
Retrieve all published cost guides with title, description, and slug.
Retrieve a single cost guide by slug with full content blocks.
Retrieve all service locations (cities/areas where Fada Lustre operates).

patch.description:
Change the cleaner's 4-digit PIN used for withdrawal verification.
Requires the current PIN and matching new/confirm PIN.

get.description:
Retrieve the authenticated cleaner's profile including name, rating,
completed bookings count, and home address.

patch.description:
Update the cleaner's profile fields (name, etc.).
Only provided fields are updated.
Initiate a phone number change by sending an OTP for verification.
Update the cleaner's home address used for proximity-based booking matching.

get.description:
List all saved bank accounts for the authenticated cleaner.
Used for receiving earnings withdrawals.

post.description: Add a new bank account for receiving earnings withdrawals.

delete.description: Remove a saved bank account. Only the owner can delete their accounts.

get.description:
Retrieve an earnings summary for the authenticated cleaner.
Includes total earned, pending, and available balance for the selected period.

List individual income transactions (completed booking payments)
with optional period filtering and pagination.
List withdrawal transactions with optional period filtering and pagination.

post.description:
Request a withdrawal of available earnings to the cleaner's bank account.
Requires PIN verification and sufficient balance.

get.description:
List bookings assigned to the authenticated cleaner.
Supports filtering by status (upcoming, ongoing, completed, all).

Retrieve detailed booking information including customer details,
address with entrance notes, and service requirements.

post.description:
Mark a scheduled booking as started. Transitions status to 'ongoing'.
Only the assigned cleaner can start their bookings.

Mark an ongoing booking as finished. Transitions status to 'done'.
Triggers earnings calculation for the cleaner.

Cancel an assigned booking from the cleaner side.
The booking returns to 'unassigned' for reassignment.

Rate the customer after a completed booking.
Rating must be 1-5. Only allowed for bookings with status 'done'.

get.description:
Retrieve the cleaner's current availability settings including
mode (default/custom), working hours, and day overrides.

put.description:
Update the cleaner's availability settings. Can toggle accepting bookings,
set default hours, or define custom day-by-day schedules.

post.description:
Create a new cleaning booking. Requires an address, service type, property details,
and preferred date/time. The booking starts in 'unassigned' status.

get.description:
List the authenticated customer's bookings with optional status filter
and pagination. Returns bookings sorted by scheduled date.

Retrieve detailed information about a specific booking including
cleaner info, payment status, and service details.

post.description:
Submit payment for a booking. Supports cash and card methods.
Optional tip amount can be included.

patch.description:
Request changes to a booking's details (e.g. room count, additional info).
Creates an amendment record for tracking.

Reschedule a booking to a new date and time.
Only allowed for bookings not yet started.

post.description:
Cancel a booking. Refund eligibility depends on the cancellation timing
relative to the scheduled date.

Create a new booking by cloning a previously cancelled or completed booking.
Copies the original service details and address.

Rate and review the cleaner after a completed booking.
Rating must be 1-5. Only allowed for bookings with status 'done'.

Request a different cleaner for a scheduled booking.
The system attempts to find an available replacement.

get.description:
Retrieve before/after images uploaded for a booking.
Accessible by the customer, assigned cleaner, and admins.

Retrieve the receipt for a booking including service details,
pricing breakdown, and payment status.

post.description:
Register a new customer account with email and password.
Returns JWT access and refresh tokens on success.

Authenticate a user (customer, cleaner, or admin) with email and password.
Returns JWT tokens. Blocked accounts receive a 403 error.

Request a password reset by phone number. Sends an OTP code via SMS
if a matching account exists. Returns a generic message to prevent email enumeration.

Verify a one-time password (OTP) code sent during the password reset flow.
Must be called before reset-password.

Set a new password after successful OTP verification.
Requires matching new_password and confirm_password fields.

Change the password for the currently authenticated user.
Requires the current password for verification.

Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair.
Use this to maintain sessions without re-authenticating.

Request a password reset for an admin account via email.
Sends a 6-digit reset code to the admin's email address.

Verify an OTP code sent during the admin password reset flow.
Use this to validate the code before showing the new-password form.
Reset an admin's password using the code sent via email.

Activate an invited admin account using the email and temporary password
received in the invitation. Returns an activation token for profile setup.

Complete admin onboarding by setting up the profile with name, phone,
and a permanent password. Requires the activation token from /activate.

Invalidate the current access token, effectively logging the user out.
The token is added to an in-memory blacklist until it expires naturally.

get.description: List all admin users with filters for status and text search.

post.description:
Invite a new admin user by email. Generates a temporary password
and creates a pending invitation record.

patch.description: Update an admin user's details (name, phone, role).

post.description:
Block an admin user, revoking their dashboard access.
Cannot block your own account.
Restore a blocked admin user, re-enabling their dashboard access.

get.description:
List all financial transactions with filters for period, type,
and text search. Includes aggregate stats.
Export transactions as a CSV file. Accepts the same filters as the list endpoint.
Retrieve full transaction details including linked booking and user info.

post.description: Send or resend the transaction receipt to the associated user's email.

get.description:
List all support tickets across users with filters for status and search.
Includes assignment info and message timestamps.
Retrieve a support ticket with full message thread and user details.

patch.description: Update ticket properties such as status, priority, or assigned agent.

post.description: Add an admin reply to a support ticket's message thread.

get.description: List all cleaning services with stats (total, active, archived).
Retrieve full service details including description, pricing, and image.

patch.description:
Archive a service, hiding it from public listings.
Existing bookings for this service are not affected.
Unarchive a service, restoring it to public listings.

get.description:
List admin roles with their assigned permissions.
Filter by status: 'active' (default), 'archived', or 'all'.

post.description: Create a new admin role with a display name and set of permissions.

patch.description: Update a role's display name or permissions.
Archive a role. Fails if any admin users are still assigned to it.

get.description:
Retrieve the authenticated admin's profile including name, email,
phone, role details, and assigned permissions.

patch.description:
Update the admin's profile fields (name, phone).
Only provided fields are updated.

get.description:
Retrieve the admin dashboard summary including balance, pending amounts,
total bookings, top clients/cleaners, upcoming bookings by service,
service counts, and recent transactions.

List all customers with filters for status, location, service type,
and text search. Includes aggregate stats.

Retrieve detailed customer information including booking history,
reviews, services booked, booking frequency, and last payment method.

post.description: Block a customer account, preventing them from logging in or making bookings.
Create a booking on behalf of a specific customer.

get.description: List all cost guides with stats (total, active, archived).

post.description: Create a new cost guide with title, description, and structured content blocks.

get.description: Retrieve a cost guide with full content blocks for editing.

patch.description: Update a cost guide's title, description, or content blocks.
Archive a cost guide, hiding it from public listings.
Unarchive a cost guide, restoring it to public listings.

get.description:
List all cleaners with filters for status, location, service type,
and text search. Includes aggregate stats.

Retrieve detailed cleaner information including reviews, availability,
payment history, and performance metrics.

post.description: Block a cleaner account, preventing them from receiving bookings.

Process a manual payment to a cleaner's bank account.
Creates a transaction record for audit tracking.

get.description:
List all bookings with filters for date, location, service type, and status.
Includes aggregate stats (total, scheduled, completed, cancelled).

post.description:
Create a booking on behalf of a customer. Used when admins receive
phone or in-person booking requests.

get.description: Get presigned download URLs for all images attached to a booking.

Retrieve full booking details including customer/cleaner info,
property details, payment status, and uploaded images.

post.description:
Assign a cleaner to an unassigned booking. Transitions status to 'scheduled'
and sends notifications to both parties.

patch.description: Reschedule a booking to a new date and time on behalf of the customer.

post.description: Cancel a booking and notify the customer and assigned cleaner.
Send or resend the booking receipt to the customer's email.

get.description:
Retrieve the admin activity log showing all actions performed by admin users.
Supports text search and pagination.
List all saved addresses for the authenticated customer.

post.description:
Save a new address to the customer's address book.
Includes street, floor, door number, and optional entrance notes.

get.description: Retrieve a single saved address by its ID.

put.description: Update an existing address. All provided fields are overwritten.

delete.description:
Soft-delete an address from the customer's address book.
The address is retained in the database for booking history.
